name: compiler
description: Compiler for MiniImp and MiniFun languages
author: Andrea Riolo Vinciguerra

scripts.build:minifun:sourcemap: tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/mainfun.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/minifun-debug --platform=node --sourcemap --minify --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env -S node --enable-source-maps" && chmod +x dist/minifun-debug
scripts.build:miniimp:sourcemap: tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/mainimp.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/miniimp-debug --platform=node --sourcemap --minify --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env -S node --enable-source-maps" && chmod +x dist/miniimp-debug
scripts.build:minifun: tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/mainfun.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/minifun --platform=node --minify --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node" && chmod +x dist/minifun
scripts.build:miniimp: tsc --noEmit && esbuild src/mainimp.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/miniimp --platform=node --minify --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node" && chmod +x dist/miniimp
